next_steps: Send CSF for Angiostrongylus cantonensis PCR and serology
Send CSF and serum for parasite serologies (Gnathostoma, Strongyloides, Toxocara)
Perform MRI of the brain and entire spine with and without gadolinium
Maintain empirical treatment until infectious etiologies are excluded
Consult infectious disease and neurology specialists
Perform repeat lumbar puncture if initial testing is inconclusive
